reviews.review_title: You have a wonderful game, can I get mod
reviews.review_description:
Look, I know you get this a lot. A lot of people want to become a mod in your game and it makes a lot of sense. Your game is awesome and cool. The servers are good and nice and funny but the reason why I want to become a mod is because when I get into arguments in the game and people start fights with me, a lot of people blame it on me and I don’t know how to defend myself sometimes when there is tag lag in the game and I text somebody and I tell him there’s tag lag they said no you’re just bad at the game. That’s something that I don’t like to hear because everybody’s not good but some people are, but there’s no point of making fun of somebody. 


This is the reason why I wanna become a mod not just to ban people, but at least to give them a warning or try to do something.

And I also see a lot of people with the name, gorilla with numbers and I tell them to go change your name because it’s Bable and they get mad at me and start cussing at me.

Like I said, you don’t have to give me mod but I would appreciate it but either way your game is cool Nice and amazing Some of my friends played it before because I told him to, but they don’t like it. They said it’s bad but that’s because it never experienced the game before.
It is soooo fun to play with players and get to have some fun
I love how it’s in the newest gorilla tag. Update you get like 100 quadrillion shiny rocks and there’s actually people playing it￼
